name: Grupo Garza Ponce was hacked! Due to a massive company vulnerability, more than 2 TB of se
message: Headquarters: 1000 Zaragoza 1, Monterrey, Nl, 64000, Mexico Phone Number: +52 8181503500 Website: www.grupogp.com.mx  Grupo Garza Ponce is a Mexican construction company based in Monterrey, Nuevo León. It was founded in 1966 by civil engineer José María Garza Ponce after he decided to take advantage of the boom in public works that Mexico was experiencing during that time.
